sessionSummary: 2026-03-16: Knocked out all open backlog items. Closed GH issues #22 (performance — indexes already done, next/dynamic for Tiptap/Plaid Link recommended), #23 (unit tests verified), #24 (JSDoc docs verified). Implemented TaskDetailModal feature: PATCH /api/tasks/[id] endpoint, TaskDetailModal component (Dialog/Drawer, description auto-saves on blur, SubtaskList, Complete+Hide), TaskTable onRowClick prop with clickable title, wired into tasks/page.tsx. All committed (77fb83f) and pushed. Next: add priority pills to TaskDetailModal, or pick from IDEAS.md backlog. No blockers. | 2026-03-16: Fixed dark mode issues in task table — Select border changed from border-input (15% white) to border-border (10% white), added hover:text-primary + transition-colors to clickable title buttons. Committed d20db1f, deployed at 09:12 UTC. Pending: add priority pills to TaskDetailModal, pick next IDEAS.md item. | 2026-03-16: Resolved Select border styling by removing the border-border override (wrong fix from prior session) and reverting to default border-input — matching Triage page behavior. Ran /update-codemaps generating docs/CODEMAPS/{architecture,backend,frontend,data}.md for 254 source files. Commits 88ca640, aa046b4, 08852f9 pushed. Next: add priority pills (P1-P4) to TaskDetailModal, then pick from IDEAS.md backlog. No blockers. | 2026-03-29: Built complete Day Structure feature (Phases 1-3). 7 new DB tables, schedule computation engine (21 tests), 14 day-structure + 4 companion API routes, routines hub + dashboard UI, companion Node.js process with AppleScript/JXA creating real Apple Reminders. Tested live — 6 reminders created. Fixed Next.js 16 proxy conflict and AppleScript iteration bug. Next: Phase 4 bidirectional sync, dashboard widget, companion on old MacBook after Liquid Glass downgrade. Follow up with Carol on Flo's pitch.

accomplished: Brainstormed Day Structure feature — routines with Apple Reminders integration via companion process

Phase 1: Added 7 new DB tables (day_structure_templates, alarms, overrides, routine_checklists, items, completions, companion_sync_state) + schedule computation engine (21 unit tests) + 14 CRUD API routes
Phase 2: Built routines hub page + day structure dashboard UI (schedule timeline, template editor, checklist cards)
Phase 3: Built companion Node.js process — AppleScript/JXA wrappers for Apple Reminders, 60s poll scheduler, 4 companion API routes with CRON_SECRET auth
Fixed Next.js 16 proxy convention conflict (moved proxy.ts to lib/, inlined config)
Fixed AppleScript iteration bug — switched to JXA for reliable reminder deletion
Tested companion live — created 6 reminders in Apple Reminders Clarity list (Off Day schedule)
Extracted 3 learned skills: applescript-iteration-bug, nextjs16-proxy-convention, turso-http-migration
Updated all 4 codemaps with day structure + companion additions
5 commits merged to main, all pushed to GitHub
